name: Sheppard Bus
registry_source: D&B / company history (NJ Treasury Division of Revenue not directly retrievable; corporate name Sheppard Bus Service, Inc.)
notes: Founded 1952 by Kenneth Sheppard; incorporated 1/1/1964. FMCSA address (Bridgeton, NJ) differs from input (Millville) but Sheppard's main depot/operations are on Rockville Rd, Bridgeton; Millville address is a satellite/listed address. Company operates 600+ school vehicles statewide per company materials; SAFER lists 711 power units which aligns. Safety rating Satisfactory as of 8/6/2024.

name: Middledorf Bus Co
registry_source: D&B record (corporate name Middledorf Bus Company Inc.); MD SDAT not directly retrievable via WebFetch

Conditional safety rating issued 10/20/2012; remained active with 20 inspections in trailing 24 months and zero crashes/OOS violations. Small fleet (~12 buses).
